title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
